title: Review Leads table quality without mutation
charter: Explore the Leads table as a sales user to discover conformance, usability, persistence, and performance risks without changing CRM data.

risks.description: Primary Leads controls are missing or undiscoverable.

steps.instruction: An authenticated dedicated QA account is on the Leads page.
Capture the visible Leads controls and table state.
Compare observed controls with confirmed requirements.
steps.expected: Every difference is classified as a feature gap or product-confirmation item.
